newsSince: Renishaw reported a record 9M FY2026 trading update — revenue +9.5% reported / +13.5% constant-currency to £571.6m, growth in every segment and region, and a substantially expanded order book. Machine-calibration demand is being underpinned by semiconductor-equipment builders, and emerging products (Equator-X) are growing strongly. The company also held its Capital Markets Day in London on June 16, 2026.

verdicts.rankRationale: On the latent AI-supply-chain lens, a record 9M update (rev +13.5% cc, broad-based, expanding order book) with calibration demand explicitly driven by semiconductor-equipment builders directly validates the precision-metrology-into-AI-manufacturing thesis. A genuine fundamental improvement plus a June 16 CMD argues up vs peers.
verdicts.bull: Record 9M results; calibration demand from semiconductor-equipment makers ties metrology directly to the AI-fab buildout; order book expanding.
verdicts.neutral: Strong print, but the stock has already re-rated +43% YTD and metrology remains cyclical.
verdicts.bear: Often screened as a slow industrial; growth could normalize as the order book unwinds.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Industrial cyclicality after a strong run
